lineage.Process: ExportFeatures "India District Boundary" D:\India_Admin\delhi\delhi.shp # NOT_USE_ALIAS "uid "ID" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,India District Boundary,uid,0,19;name "District Name" true true false 100 Text 0 0,First,#,India District Boundary,name,0,99;state "State Name" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,India District Boundary,state,0,49;country "Country Name" true true false 20 Text 0 0,First,#,India District Boundary,country,0,19;censusname "Name (Census)" true true false 70 Text 0 0,First,#,India District Boundary,censusname,0,69;dist_locallang "District Name (in Local Language)" true true false 50 Text 0 0,First,#,India District Boundary,dist_locallang,0,49;lgd_districtname "Local Govt.
